title: Partnerships with international organizations - Canada.ca
content:
## Partnerships with international organizations
Environment and Climate Change Canada works together with many different international partners to protect Canada’s environment. These partners include various regional and international organizations.
- Asia-Pacific Partnership - archived
- Commission for Environmental Cooperation
- Commission on Sustainable Development
- Global Environment Facility
- Major Economies Forum on Energy and Climate
- Montreal Protocol Program
- Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development
- United Nations Environment Programme
- UN Framework Convention on Climate Change
- U.S. - Canada Clean Energy Dialogue - archived
- Chairs Conclusions from the Arctic Environment Ministers Meeting
- China Council: global climate change cooperation

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
